title: gleichenia rupestris
intro: Gleichenia rupestris, also known as the rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. It is native to Australia and is often found growing in rocky outcrops and woodlands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Gleichenia rupestris is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits are believed to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
